ecommerce.description: Upload a product photo and we'll create a scroll-stopping commercial visual optimized for your platform.
ecommerce.uploadTitle: Upload or drag & drop a product photo
ecommerce.uploadHint: JPEG, PNG or WebP — up to 5 MB
ecommerce.wishPlaceholder: e.g. marble podium, warm studio light, pastel gradient…
ecommerce.overlayTextRequired: Enter on-image text or turn off the text overlay toggle.

assistant.placeholder: Describe the background in your language (e.g. marble podium, warm light)…
assistant.hint: Write in Russian or Uzbek — the assistant will build a professional English Grok prompt.
assistant.success: The assistant crafted the perfect English prompt for Grok and added a marketing slogan!
assistant.error: Could not generate a prompt. Please try again.

ecommerce.tryOnFallbackBanner: ⚠️ Note: We switched to "Product photo" mode because no clothing was detected in the uploaded image. Try-on is only available for wardrobe items.
ecommerce.tryOnFallbackVerificationBanner: ⚠️ Could not verify the product type. We switched to "Product photo" mode and created a standard image instead of try-on.

tryOnUpload.humanAria: Upload person or model photo for try-on
tryOnUpload.humanUploadedHint: Your photo will be used for try-on
tryOnUpload.modelSelectedHint: Using a model from our gallery

ecommerce.invalidType: Please upload a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
ecommerce.fileTooLarge: File size must not exceed 5 MB.
ecommerce.readFailed: Could not read the image file. Please try again.
ecommerce.extractTextLabel: Extract text from image (Content Remix mode)

form.title: Create your visual
form.description: Create engaging content for your brand or blog in seconds with artificial intelligence.
form.promptPlaceholder: e.g. New clothing collection launch, stylist tips post, or a gym promotion…

examples: New summer collection drop — bold typography, warm sunset tones, square 1:1
Fitness club promo: energetic layout, neon accents, Instagram Story 9:16
Stylist tips carousel cover: clean magazine aesthetic, minimal negative space

loading.hint: This may take up to a minute

preview.title: Preview
preview.emptyDescription: Enter a post idea and generate a scroll-stopping visual for Instagram or Facebook.

alerts.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
alerts.downloadWarning: Could not download the image. Right-click the image and choose "Save image as…".
alerts.tryOnFallbackNotClothing: Try-on is not available for this item (not clothing). A standard product photo was created instead.
alerts.tryOnFallbackVerification: Could not verify the product type. A standard product photo was created instead of try-on.

api.serverUnreachable: Unable to reach the server. Please try again in a moment.
api.invalidResponse: Received an invalid response from the server.
api.backendHint: Make sure the backend is running on port 5000 (npm run dev:backend).
api.authRequired: Please sign in to generate images.
api.authInvalid: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
api.insufficientCredits: You have no credits left. Top up your balance to continue.
api.fingerprintRequired: Could not verify your browser session. Please refresh the page.

auth.signInBanner: Sign in to generate visuals and track your credits.
auth.signInFailed: Could not sign in with Google. Please try again.
auth.loginDescription: Sign in with Google to save your account and purchase credits.
auth.loginHint: By signing in, you agree to our terms of service and privacy policy.
auth.loginHintPrefix: By signing in, you agree to our
auth.notConfigured: Supabase is not configured yet. Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to frontend/.env.
auth.cabinetHint: Your credit balance is used for each successful generation.

pricing.title: Get more credits
pricing.description: You've used your free generations. Choose a credit pack to keep creating.
pricing.hint: Credits are added manually within a few hours after payment.
pricing.manualPaymentNotice: YooKassa is not connected yet. Payments go to a self-employed provider — tap Contact and we'll send payment details and add credits once received.
pricing.topUpDescription: Choose a pack in the generator or contact us directly.
pricing.mailBody:
Hello!

I'd like to buy: {{tier}} ({{price}}).
My SnapFeed.ai email: {{email}}

Ready to pay to a self-employed provider. Please send payment details.
pricing.guestDescription: You've used your {{count}} free guest generations. Sign in to create an account and purchase credits.
pricing.guestBenefit2: Account saves your profile and credit balance
pricing.welcomeDescription: Your account is ready. Top up your balance to start creating.
pricing.welcomeHint: Need more? Choose a credit pack below.

chat.title: ✨ AI Assistant (Write in your language)
chat.placeholder: Tell AI what kind of image you want (e.g., 'fashion promo, warm tones')...
chat.promptInserted: Prompt inserted into the field above — you can edit it or click Generate.
chat.hybridHint: The scene description stays in English (for AI quality); the on-image text and hashtags use your selected language.
chat.error: Could not generate a prompt. Please try again.

legal.termsIntro: These terms govern your use of SnapFeed.ai. By using the service you accept them.
legal.termsUseBody: SnapFeed.ai generates visual content using AI. You are responsible for the prompts you submit and how you use generated images. Do not use the service for illegal, harmful, or infringing content.
legal.termsCreditsBody: Generations consume credits. Credit packs are sold manually until online payments are connected. Credits are non-refundable except where required by law.
legal.termsContactBody: For billing or support questions, email
legal.privacyIntro: This policy describes what data SnapFeed.ai collects and how we use it.
legal.privacyDataBody: When you sign in with Google, we store your profile (email, name, avatar) in Supabase to manage your account and credit balance. Generated images are processed on our servers and third-party AI providers (OpenAI, Replicate).
legal.privacyGuestBody: Without signing in, we use a browser fingerprint hash and optional IP address to enforce free generation limits. This data is stored in our database and is not used for advertising.
legal.privacyContactBody: To request data deletion or ask privacy questions, email
